nasb.text: He said, “What sin have I committed, that you are giving your servant into the hand of Ahab to put me to death?

esv.text: And he said, “How have I sinned, that you would give your servant into the hand of Ahab, to kill me?

cnv.text: 俄巴底說：“我犯了甚麼罪，你竟要把你僕人交在亞哈手裡，使他殺死我呢？

ccb.text: 俄巴底说：“仆人犯了什么罪，你竟叫我去亚哈那里送死？
